issues: Avalanche snow texture appears somewhat artificial and less dense than real snow, especially in the initial fracture which looks blocky.

issues: Snow texture appears somewhat artificial and uniform in several frames.

fix_notes: Ensure snow texture is more varied and natural.

issues: Water on the windshield in the interior shot (frame 6) appears artificial and lacks photorealism, resembling a graphic overlay rather than authentic water interaction with glass.
fix_notes: Render water on windshields with realistic physics and photorealistic detail.
